msg: Taxonomy complete, found 12 categories, 80+ skills catalogued, 15 underserved use cases identified

Found 24 use cases from official OpenClaw showcase + docs. Web search unavailable (no Brave API key) — HN/dev.to/medium searches skipped. Sourced from docs.openclaw.ai/start/showcase. Top finds: 14-agent orchestration, Tesco autopilot, iOS app via Telegram, autonomous Slack bug fix, WhatsApp vault (1k+ voice notes), Couch Potato website rebuild via Netflix+Telegram, Inside-Out memory system.

Found 40+ use cases (20 documented in detail + 12 wild skill discoveries), 6 competitors analyzed. Top finds: overnight mini-app builder (10/10), AI guest phone calls (10/10), VTuber streaming (10/10), agentpay buying real things (10/10). Ecosystem: 322k main repo, 39.1k skills index, 34.5k nanobot clone, 25.9k usecases list. ClawHub has 13,729 skills total.
